'''Gosfambling''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], and was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Gosfambling (species)|Gosfamblings]]. [[C-Gosf]] represented the world in the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]].

[[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] stopped the production of their [[LIN demolitionmech autonomous minelayer/Legends|LIN demolitionmech autonomous minelayer]] after an incident on Gosfamnling. A [[Detonite charge/Legends|detonite charge]] exploded while the LIN unit was handling it, causing a cave-in. Six hundred [[Miner/Legends|miners]] were trapped and suffocated to [[Death/Legends|death]].<ref name="EGTD">''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
